# Project Setup Instructions

## Sunworld Ba Na Hills Ticket Booking System - MVC Architecture

### Current Progress:
- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md file created
- [x] Project Requirements Clarified - MVC web app for cable car ticket booking
- [x] Scaffold the Project - MVC structure created successfully
- [x] Customize the Project - All booking system features implemented
- [x] Install Required Extensions - None needed (vanilla JS)
- [x] Compile the Project - All files created and verified
- [x] Create and Run Task - Ready to launch with local server

### Project Type: 
Custom MVC Web Application (HTML/CSS/JavaScript)

### Features:
- ✅ Queue number booking system for cable cars
- ✅ Two routes: Ga Suoi Mo ↔ Dinh Ba Na
- ✅ Responsive modern design
- ✅ Vietnamese language support
- ✅ Tourist attractions showcase
- ✅ Smooth scrolling navigation
- ✅ Form validation and error handling
- ✅ LocalStorage data persistence
- ✅ Modal system for bookings
- ✅ Professional animations and transitions
